path.description: Relative path of the file to read

file-read.description: Read the contents of a file inside the active workspace.

dir-list.description: List files and directories inside a workspace path.

path.description: Relative path of the file to write (e.g. prueba.md)

content.description: Text content to write into the file

file-write.description: Write or create a file inside the active workspace. Use path (relative) and content.

_note: Minimal runtime manifest. Full manifest generated by bago auto_register.
